# Tayseer Laz — Personal Portfolio

## About
Tayseer Laz is a Product Developer based in Beirut, Lebanon. He holds a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer & Communication Engineering from Rafik Hariri University, Lebanon. He specializes in end-to-end product development, UI/UX design, SaaS platforms, mobile applications, and AI integration. He has 2+ years of experience, has built 4+ products, and worked with 3+ companies.

## Contact
- Email: laztayseer@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/tayseer-laz
- Phone: +961 81 238 320
- Website: https://tayseerlaz.com

## Skills
Product Strategy, UI/UX Design, Wireframing & Prototyping, Design Systems, User Research, React, Next.js, React Native, Flutter, Node.js, Firebase, HTML/CSS/TypeScript, SharePoint Framework, Figma, Google Play/App Store Publishing, Git/GitHub, Jira/Linear, AI Tools & Chatbots, Computer Vision, TensorFlow

## Projects

### Alinia SaaS Platform (2025 — Present)
Role: Product Developer at Aligned Tech
Leading product vision and end-to-end execution including UI/UX design, multi-role agency panels, workflow systems, and AI-powered tools. Built interactive dashboards with real-time analytics. Integrated AI chatbots for automated client support and onboarding.
Tech: React, Node.js, Firebase, AI/ML, Figma

### Dyafa Event & Hospitality Platform (2024 — 2025)
Role: Product Developer at IEvents Qatar
Multi-vendor event platform serving the Qatar market. Built and published mobile apps on Google Play Store and Apple App Store. Developed POS system for on-site event operations. Built AI chatbot for event attendee support. Coordinated cross-functional teams across Qatar, Turkey, and Lebanon. Mentored interns and junior developers.
Tech: React Native, Firebase, Node.js, Figma, AI Integration

### Real Estate SaaS Platform (2025)
Role: Product Developer (Freelance)
Led product vision from concept to launch. Designed complete UI/UX with multi-role user flows. Built web application with property management features. Structured business logic and data workflows. Initiated mobile application development.
Tech: React, Node.js, MongoDB, Figma

### OmniSign — AI Sign Language Translation (2024 — Present)
Role: Co-Founder & Product Contributor
AI-powered sign language platform co-founded by Tayseer Laz, featuring gesture recognition and real-time translation for accessibility. The platform aims to bridge communication gaps for the deaf and hard-of-hearing community. Built the first Lebanese Sign Language dataset. Structured workflows for AI gesture recognition pipeline. Designed user experience focused on accessibility and inclusivity.
Tech: Python, TensorFlow, React, Computer Vision

## Education
Bachelor of Engineering in Computer & Communication Engineering — Rafik Hariri University, Lebanon
